arts.ttl: Exeter City always held belief that the Crawley fightback was on
arts.sum: Exeter City may have been 4-1 down at half-time to Crawley Town, but there was a belief within the squad that they would get something from the game. “The manager said if we get the first goal in the second half we will get something from the game and we did.

arts.ttl: Preview: Wycombe Wanderers vs. Exeter City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's League One clash between Wycombe Wanderers and Exeter City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
